description_long: This is an ornate, collar-style necklace reminiscent of ancient Egyptian jewelry, featuring a broad, semi-circular gold band adorned with intricate engraved patterns. The necklace is segmented into panels, each decorated with gold floral and geometric motifs, giving it a regal and ceremonial appearance. Along the inner edge, a row of large, turquoise-colored cabochon stones is set, providing a striking contrast to the metallic gold. The collar rises at the back into a short, cylindrical neck ring, suggesting a snug fit around the base of the neck. The craftsmanship is detailed, with high-relief engravings and a polished, glossy finish that reflects light. The overall design is both bold and elegant, suitable for statement wear in formal or historical-themed urban settings.
description: A broad, gold collar necklace with turquoise cabochons and intricate engraved motifs, inspired by ancient Egyptian design. The piece is highly ornate and features a glossy, polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full semi-circular spread of the gold collar, the turquoise cabochons, and the detailed engraved motifs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the raised neck ring and the curvature of the collar, with the turquoise stones visible along the inner edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the symmetrical spread of the collar and the continuation of the engraved motifs, with the neck ring centered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the collar's thickness, curvature, and the alignment of turquoise stones.
